name: Active Global Headcount Report
summary: Generate the global headcount workspace with KPIs, movement views, detailed tabs, and Pigment export.

name: A/R Aging Report
summary: Generate the A/R aging workspace with cleaned buckets, top-customer variance review, and export-ready report output.

name: BvA Dashboard
summary: Generate a generic BvA dashboard from Quarter, Year, HC, and T&E feeds with dynamic labels, KPIs, drivers, HC, T&E, and actions.

name: Total HC Actuals by Function
summary: Generate the headcount-by-function view, including hires, attrition, transfers, subtotals, and Costa Rica edits.

name: OPEX Review Board
summary: Review OPEX activity, reclasses, missing accruals, and recommendations.

name: SBC Cost Center Feed
summary: Generate mapped SBC cost-center feeds, validate totals, upload mapping files, and export quarter or consolidated CSVs.
